'''Entrus''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]]. It was a [[Temperature/Legends|temperate]] world scattered with many islands. [[Gambling/Legends|Gambling]] resorts were built upon the hundreds of islands on the planet, resulting in underwater [[City/Legends|cities]] and [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] platforms filling the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] and skies. The cities were densely populated with entertainment complexes sometimes towering hundreds of meters. It contained the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Trax Sector Command]] for the Trax sector. The base only had a small number of personnel of less than 25 strategists and planners.

{{Planet-stub}}
